name: can-scanner
description: CAN bus / namespace address scanner - discovers what vehicle data is available via GEM key-value polling on your specific MMI3G system
author: dspl1236
screens: ScannerPer3Engine.esd - Per 3 addresses 0x0001xxxx (possible engine ECU data)
ScannerMixed.esd - Per 3 high range + Per 1 system addresses
ScannerStrings.esd - String values that identify data sources
scripts: scanner_install.sh - Install scanner screens and scripts
scan_log.sh - Log GEM visible data + shmem + syslog CAN entries
scan_shmem.sh - Deep dump of shared memory for offline analysis
notes: The per 3 namespace carries CAN bus data but addresses are undocumented. This scanner probes address ranges so you can visually identify which ones return live data (RPM, speed, boost, coolant, etc.) on your specific vehicle. Results are logged to SD card for analysis. This is an exploration tool — results will vary by vehicle platform and firmware version.
